meaning: adj.最稀罕的,最珍贵的(rare的比较级)
examples: Further away, the world's rarest (罕见的) duck, the Madagascar pochard, is making a comeback.
The rarest of the rare are these shots: a mother, in her den, cradling her newborn panda baby.
Wealthy people would compete, spending enormous amounts of money to buy the rarest flowers for their gardens.
In the late 1990s, the Bali starling became one of the rarest birds in the world.
Stacey, the world around us know that truth has become one of the rarest of all commidities!
